scripts.deploy:dev: rsync -rv --delete _site/ root@sydney.emom.me:/var/www/html/test.emom.me/ && rsync -rv --delete forms_bridge/ root@sydney.emom.me:/opt/emom/website-test/forms_bridge/ && ssh root@sydney.emom.me 'systemctl restart emom-forms-bridge-test'
scripts.deploy:prod: rsync -rv --delete _site/ root@sydney.emom.me:/var/www/html/sydney.emom.me/ && rsync -rv --delete forms_bridge/ root@sydney.emom.me:/opt/emom/website/forms_bridge/ && ssh root@sydney.emom.me 'systemctl restart emom-forms-bridge'
